title: Aperture Textures
description: A resource pack that makes some blocks Portal Themed. Intended to be used with PortalMod .
body:
# **Aperture Textures**

This resource pack rextures a few vanilla blocks to be more Portal themed for [PortalMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/portalmod).

You will need Fusion for connected textures in order for this resource pack to work.
